title: HitRange
description: shows player's hit range with a circle
body:
# HitRange

a simple mod that displays your reach (and other player's) with a circle in the world!

massive thanks to Krymonota for making the [original hit range mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hit-range-mod) and to WinterStars for asking me to make this about 2 years ago

### Dependencies
- [ukulib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)
